name: escapemint
description: A local-first, open-source capital allocation engine for rules-based fund management

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:packages && npm run setup:data
scripts.setup:data: mkdir -p data/funds && echo 'Created data/funds directory. Use Settings > Generate Test Data to populate sample data.'
scripts.dev:api: cd packages/server && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.build:packages: npm run build:engine && npm run build:storage
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:server && npm run build:web && npm run build:backtest
scripts.build:server: npx tsc --project packages/server/tsconfig.json && cp -r packages/server/src/data packages/server/dist/
scripts.build:backtest: cd pages && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:engine && npm run test:storage
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:unit && npm run test:coverage:report
scripts.test:coverage:unit: npm run test:coverage:engine && npm run test:coverage:storage && npm run test:coverage:server && npm run test:coverage:web
scripts.test:coverage:server: cd packages/server && npx vitest run --coverage || true
scripts.test:coverage:web: cd packages/web && npx vitest run --coverage || true

author: Adam Eivy (@antic|@atomantic)
